nodes.recentposition: Founder/ Organizer at A Drop of Delight, Remote
nodes.bios: Hello! My name is Max and I initiated in the Fall quarter of my first year with the Alpha Kappa class. In my free time, I love playing my bass, watching the Chargers, and learning about cars. A fun fact about me is that I know how to pick locks :) Ask me about space, A Drop of Delight, my favorite tv shows, or anything else at recruitment!
